introSection: Big Dipper was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by Butlin's previously located at Butlin's Grand Parade Amusement Park in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK.
fullText: Big Dipper was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by Butlin's previously located at Butlin's Grand Parade Amusement Park in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK.
